creator: issei@t-cnet.or.jp
text:
The message from SSLtelnet daemon (${PREFIX}/libexec/telnetd) is terminated
by "\n" and it should be "\r\n". If you use SSL telnet application on Windows or
Macintosh plathome, the message from SSLtelnet daemon is shown like steps.

Fix: 

I put the port including this fix below:
	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/SSLtelnet-980602.tar.gz
